---
id: get-matched-device-capabilities
title: "Query Device Matching Capabilities"
description: "Query the capabilities of a single device that meet the filter criteria. Only matched definitions and the current value for the corresponding traits will be returned. The full device definition will NOT be returned."
sidebar_label: "Query Device Matching Capabilities"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Query Device Matching Capabilities"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/devices/capabilities"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Query the capabilities of a single device that meet the filter criteria. Only matched definitions and the current value for the corresponding traits will be returned. The full device definition will NOT be returned.

:::tip
- `functionCodes`, `traitCodes`, and `commandCodes` are combined using AND logic. To query for any trait or command capabilities, please send separate requests, or query the complete function definition using only `functionCodes`.
- If only `functionCodes` are provided and neither `traitCodes` nor `commandCodes` are passed: all complete Trait and Command definitions under that Function (i.e., all leaf nodes) are returned.
- If `traitCodes` or `commandCodes` are provided: only the Trait or Command leaves matching these criteria are returned; non-matching leaves are not returned. Commands do not include a current value.
- If the device exists but no capabilities match, basic device info is returned with `endpoints=[]`. If the device does not exist or cannot be accessed, `data=null`.
:::


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"deviceId","in":"query","required":true,"description":"Device ID.","schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"deviceTypesList","in":"query","required":false,"description":"List of device types. The API first verifies the overall type of the device, and then filters endpoints by type.   \n\n:::tip\n`deviceTypesList` cannot be used on its own as a capability filter.\n:::\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"deviceTypesMatchMode","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Match mode for multiple types in `deviceTypesList`:\n- `or`: Device matches any of the types.\n- `and`: Device must match all specified types simultaneously.\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["or","and"],"default":"or"},"example":"or"},{"name":"functionCodes","in":"query","required":false,"description":"List of function codes.\nAt least one of `functionCodes`, `traitCodes`, or `commandCodes` must be provided.\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"functionCodesMatchMode","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Match mode for multiple `functionCodes`:\n- `or`: Match any.\n- `and`: The result must contain all specified function codes.\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["or","and"],"default":"or"},"example":"or"},{"name":"traitCodes","in":"query","required":false,"description":"List of trait codes.\nAt least one of `functionCodes`, `traitCodes`, or `commandCodes` must be provided.\nIf matched, will return the trait definition, current value, and last updated time.\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"traitCodesMatchMode","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Match mode for multiple `traitCodes`:\n- `and`: All traits must be matched within the same function.\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["or","and"],"default":"or"},"example":"or"},{"name":"commandCodes","in":"query","required":false,"description":"List of command codes.\nAt least one of `functionCodes`, `traitCodes`, or `commandCodes` must be provided.\nIf matched, will only return the command and parameter definitions (no current values).\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"name":"commandCodesMatchMode","in":"query","required":false,"description":"Match mode for multiple `commandCodes`:\n- `and`: All commands must be matched within the same function.\n","schema":{"type":"string","enum":["or","and"],"default":"or"},"example":"or"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Request succeeded.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","name","deviceTypesList","endpoints"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"Device ID"},"gatewayId":{"type":"string","nullable":true,"description":"The gateway ID to which this device is bound.\nIf `gatewayId` equals `deviceId`, it indicates that this device is itself a gateway.\nIf `gatewayId` is `null` or an empty string, it means this device is a directly connected gateway without subdevices or a third-party integrated device.\n"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Device name"},"deviceTypesList":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"},"description":"Device type list"},"endpoints":{"type":"array","description":"Endpoint list","items":{"type":"object","required":["endpointId","endpointName","deviceType","functions"],"properties":{"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"Endpoint ID"},"endpointName":{"type":"string","description":"Endpoint name"},"deviceType":{"type":"string","description":"Device type"},"functions":{"type":"array","description":"Function list","items":{"type":"object","required":["functionCode"],"properties":{"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"Function code (e.g. LevelControl, ColorControl, CurrentLevel, ColorTemperature, OnOff)"},"parameter":{"description":"Trait parameter","allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Data type.<br />\n<table>\n  <thead>\n    <tr>\n      <th>Name</th>\n      <th>Type</th>\n      <th>Description</th>\n    </tr>\n  </thead>\n  <tbody>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Bool</td>\n      <td>Boolean</td>\n This field is meaningful only when parameter.type is Enum.","type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"Key-value pair","required":["key","value"],"properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"Key"},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value"}},"title":"KeyValue"},"nullable":true},"unit":{"description":"Unit. This field is only meaningful when parameter.type is Integer or Float.","type":"string","nullable":true},"step":{"description":"Step size. This field is only meaningful when parameter.type is Integer or Float.","type":"number","format":"double","nullable":true}},"title":"BaseParameter"},{"type":"object","required":["readable","writable","subscribable"],"properties":{"readable":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether it is readable","default":true},"writable":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether it is writable","default":true},"subscribable":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether it is subscribable","default":true}}}],"title":"TraitParameter"},"value":{"description":"Current value. The type is consistent with the parameter.type.","oneOf":[{"type":"boolean"},{"type":"integer"},{"type":"number","format":"double"},{"type":"string"}],"title":"FlexibleValue"},"time":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Value update time (UTC timestamp in milliseconds)"}},"title":"Trait"}},"commands":{"type":"array","description":"Command list","items":{"type":"object","required":["commandCode"],"properties":{"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"Command code (e.g. MoveToXYColor)"},"fields":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["fieldCode","parameter"],"properties":{"fieldCode":{"type":"string","description":"Field code (e.g. ColorX, ColorY, Time)"},"parameter":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Data type.<br />\n<table>\n  <thead>\n    <tr>\n      <th>Name</th>\n      <th>Type</th>\n      <th>Description</th>\n    </tr>\n  </thead>\n  <tbody>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Bool</td>\n      <td>Boolean</td>\n      <td>True or false (true/false).</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Integer</td>\n      <td>Integer</td>\n      <td>Integer type.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Float</td>\n      <td>Float</td>\n      <td>Number with decimals.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>String</td>\n      <td>String</td>\n      <td>String value.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Struct</td>\n      <td>Struct</td>\n      <td>Structured data customized by Aqara, in JSON string format.<br />It can include fields of multiple types.</td>\n    </tr>\n    <tr>\n      <td>Enum</td>\n      <td>Enum</td>\n      <td>Enumeration.
